50: // Status reports the job’s current status.
51: func (c *censusJob) Status() scheduler.JobStatus {
52: 	return scheduler.JobStatus{}
53: }
54: 
55: // Run performs the required work depending on the implementation.
56: // The context is used to notify the job that it should exit early.
57: func (c *censusJob) Run(ctx context.Context) error {
58: 	err := RunFn(ctx, c)
59: 	return err
60: }
61: 
62: func runInternal(ctx context.Context, c *censusJob) error {
63: 	return nil
64: }
65: 
66: // NextRunIn returns the duration until the next job run should be scheduled.
67: // Census will run every hour to ensure any interrupted jobs will be re-attempted
68: func (c *censusJob) NextRunIn(_ context.Context) (time.Duration, error) {
69: 	return time.Hour, nil
70: }
71:
